hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' 2>/dev/null); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit'; then if ! git -C /Users/curtiswilliams/Projects_Local_Repo/trendfitapp.github.io diff HEAD~1 HEAD --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'CHANGELOG.md'; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"REMINDER: CHANGELOG.md was not updated in this commit. Consider whether this change needs a changelog entry."}}'; fi; fi
